easily_confused_with.difference: INA226 is the higher-resolution successor (16-bit, lower offset) and measures bus voltage to 36V; INA219 reaches 26V. Different I2C register map, different ESPHome platform.

variants.verification_method: TI marking; the B grade (INA219BIDR) has tighter gain error than the A grade. Common breakout is the GY-219 board with a 0.1 ohm shunt.

pullup_resistor.note: External I2C pull-ups if the board does not provide them

shunt_resistor.note: Default 0.1 ohm shunt on common breakouts; set the matching shunt_resistance in ESPHome

limitations.note: Measures bus voltage up to 26V and current via the shunt; the IC supply (VS) is separate and stays 3.0-5.5V. Match shunt_resistance and max_current in the ESPHome config to the board's shunt.
